---
title: "ISI"
format: revealjs
---

## Monitoring species distributions {.smaller}

::: columns
::: {.column width="40%"}
-   Biodiversity monitoring programs have become essential to **understand** species distributions.

-   The modelling of species distributions is important for both theoretical and applied ecology.

-   The analysis of species distribution data is **challenging**
:::

::: {.column width="60%"}
sss
:::
:::
